title: helichrysum acutatum
intro: Helichrysum acutatum, also known as the prickly paperflower, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Helichrysum acutatum include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and improving skin health, as well as providing relief from anxiety and stress. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
